headline: SK Hynix +12% on Micron earnings beat
detail: Micron delivered blockbuster results and SK Hynix exploded 12% higher - this is the strongest direct read-through for your chip and semi holdings. AVGO and SMH are the clearest beneficiaries; this could provide a short-term lift that gives you a better exit or trim point on AVGO while it's flagged.

headline: Anthropic AI data center expansion hiring spree
detail: Anthropic aggressively building out AI infrastructure signals continued hyperscaler capex demand. This is a slow-burn positive for PLTR (AI software) and AVGO (custom AI chips/networking), though neither gets an immediate price catalyst from this alone.

headline: Hormuz tanker traffic resumes, oil erases gains
detail: Oil risk premium fading is a net positive for tech - lower energy costs ease inflation fears and keep rate-cut hopes alive, which supports high-multiple names like PLTR and CRWD. Removes one macro headwind from your book today.

headline: Tesla and Waymo robotaxi race heats up
detail: The robotaxi narrative keeps autonomous and AI-adjacent names in the spotlight. Indirect read-through for PLTR given its AI/data analytics exposure, but no direct revenue catalyst for your holdings today.
